methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs: a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, source-level key results, explicit team ownership, and limited use of High Integrity Commitments.

objectives.title: 2026-Q1 Global Frequent Flyer Member outcome goal
objectives.objective: Improve Premium booking conversion rate for Global Frequent Flyer Member by advancing direct premium conversion and self-service servicing quality through identity-linked retailing and trip confidence.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Composite measure of how confidently premium guests can shop, prepare, travel, and recover when plans change.
Share of premium-intent shopping sessions that turn into confirmed bookings.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Expected contribution from a premium guest across repeat flights, ancillaries, loyalty, and partner spend.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Trip confidence index during the quarter.
keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Premium booking conversion rate during the quarter.
keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Premium guest lifetime value during the quarter.
keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

linkedInitiatives.description: Corporate content control and partner continuity initiative

objectives.title: 2026-Q1 Network Operations Control Director outcome goal
objectives.objective: Improve Completion factor for Network Operations Control Director by advancing operational stability and guest-aware disruption recovery through integrated operations and guest recovery control.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Share of planned flights operated to completion.
Time needed to move from disruption detection to an agreed recovery action.

linkedBusinessKPIs.kpiName: Irregular operations cost per disrupted flight
linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Direct operational and guest-handling cost incurred for each materially disrupted flight.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Completion factor during the quarter.
keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Decrease Recovery decision cycle time during the quarter.
keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

keyResults.metric: Irregular operations cost per disrupted flight
keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Decrease Irregular operations cost per disrupted flight during the quarter.
keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe meaningful business and customer outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure source objectives, while source objectives map upward into a small set of company objectives.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.
High Integrity Commitments are used sparingly and only for work that is materially deadline-sensitive.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q1 Make execution reliably repeatable
companyObjectives.statement: Improve the operating system behind the product so launches, service recovery, reliability, and cross-functional delivery become predictably repeatable.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Keeps teams accountable for operational outcomes.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q1 Turn product progress into economic leverage
companyObjectives.statement: Translate better customer and operational outcomes into stronger revenue quality, retention, and strategic leverage for the business.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Separates commercial results from activity metrics.
